channel.title: Android on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Android on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: dotnet: Give Your .NET MAUI Android Apps a Material 3 Makeover
item.description:
Material 3 support is now available for .NET MAUI apps on Android. The post explains how to enable it, what changes are included now, and what is still planned.

  • Source: .NET

item.title: dotnet: .NET MAUI Moves to CoreCLR in .NET 11
item.description:
In .NET 11, .NET MAUI apps on Android, iOS, and Mac Catalyst run on CoreCLR by default. This aligns MAUI with the same runtime used across the rest of .NET.

  • Source: .NET
